dashboard.hero_desc: Identify crop diseases early and protect your harvest.
dashboard.early_detection_desc: Regular leaf scanning can prevent up to 80% of crop losses in the early stages of disease.
dashboard.sync_offline: Will sync automatically when back online.

scan.title: Scan Leaf
scan.preview_tip: Make sure the leaf is clearly visible and well-lit for the most accurate AI diagnosis.
scan.placeholder: e.g., leaves are turning yellow with brown spots...
scan.char_limit_error: Description must be at least 5 characters
scan.tip_parts: Mention which parts are affected (leaves, stems, fruit)
scan.tip_time: Note when you first noticed the problem
scan.camera_hint: Center the affected leaf within the frame
scan.camera_req_desc: Allow camera access to scan your crop and detect possible diseases.
scan.capture_error: Failed to capture image. Please try again or use the gallery.

result.title: Diagnosis Result
result.empty_desc: We couldn't identify the issue clearly. Please try with a clearer photo or add more symptom description.
result.analysis_error: Failed to analyze. Please try again.
result.generic_error: Something went wrong while analyzing your scan.
result.error_tips:
• Take a clearer photo with good lighting
• Ensure the leaf is in focus
• Include both healthy and affected areas
• Add a description of what you see

analyzing.desc: Our AI is examining your crop leaf

settings.title: Settings
settings.lang_description: Choose your preferred language for the CropWatch app.

auth.sign_in_desc: Sign in to continue monitoring your crops and getting AI diagnoses.

modals.logout_message: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
modals.deactivate_message: This action is permanent and will delete all your data. Are you absolutely sure?
modals.sign_out_all_message: This will log you out of all devices currently using this account.
